      "それはリバタリアン運動に影響を与えます。",
      "それはアメリカの右派政治に影響を与えます。"
    ],

      "それはアメリカの右派政治を新保守主義運動から移行させるために作成されました。"
    ],
    "DevelopedBy": [

    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "それは保護主義への反対を特徴としています。",
      "それは社会前衛とリバタリアニズムの結びつきへの反対を特徴としています。",
      "それは西洋文化への憎悪を特徴としています。",
      "それはマナーと趣味の伝統に従うことを特徴としています。",
      "それはリバタリアンの原則を中産階級を国家に対して急進化させる方法で適用することを特徴としています。",

    "UsedFor": [
      "それはリバタリアンと古保守派を団結させるために使用されます。",
      "それは政府介入への反対というリバタリアンの考えを伝えるために使用されます。",
      "それはリバタリアン自由市場の見解と古保守主義の文化的保守主義を組み合わせるために使用されます。",
      "それは保護主義に反対するために使用されます。",
      "それは伝統と宗教への古保守主義の敬意を受け入れるために使用されます。",
      "それは国家に対する市民の急進化のために使用されます。",
      "それは政策志向のリバタリアン組織の影響からリバタリアン運動を移行させるために使用されます。",
      "それはアメリカの右派政治を新保守主義運動から移行させるために使用されます。",
      "それは中産階級により良い自由の議論をするために使用されます。",
      "それはリバタリアンの原則を中産階級を国家に対して急進化させる方法で適用するために使用されます。"
    ],
    "UsedIn": [
      "それはアメリカの政治的文脈で使用されます。",
      "それは冷戦終結という文脈で使用されます。",
      "それは1992年の大統領選挙で使用されます。",
      "それは2016年の共和党大統領予備選挙で使用されます。",
      "それは2016年アメリカ大統領選挙のキャンペーンで使用されます。"
    ],
    "UsedTo": [
      "それは政府介入への反対というリバタリアンの考えを伝えるために使用されます。",
      "それは国家に対する市民の急進化のために使用されます。",
      "それは政策志向のリバタリアン組織の影響からリバタリアン運動を移行させるために使用されます。",

      "それは反戦・反福祉の右派を再誕させるために使用されます。",

About: It is about a right-libertarian political activism strategy aimed at uniting libertarians and paleoconservatives.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with right-wing populism.
It is associated with the John Randolph Club.
It is associated with the Mises Caucus.
BelongsTo: It belongs to the right-libertarian political spectrum.
ConsistsOf: It consists of libertarian free market views combined with the cultural conservatism of paleoconservatism.
It consists of the paleoconservative reverence for tradition and religion.
CreatedTo: It was created to radicalize citizens against the state.
It was created to communicate libertarian notions of opposition to government intervention.
It was created to shift the libertarian movement away from the influence of public policy-oriented libertarian organizations.
It was created to shift American right-wing politics away from the neoconservative movement.
DevelopedBy: It was developed by American anarcho-capitalist theorists Murray Rothbard and Lew Rockwell.
DevelopedIn: It was developed in the American political context after the end of the Cold War.
HasA: It has a reverence for tradition and religion.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by opposition to protectionism.
It is characterized by opposition to the link between social avant-garde and libertarianism.
It is characterized by a hatred of Western culture.
It is characterized by obedience to traditions of manners and taste.
It is characterized by the application of libertarian principles in ways that lead to the radicalization of the middle classes against the state.
It is characterized by the intention to rebirth an anti-war and anti-welfare right-wing.
It is characterized by a lack of practical results.
It is characterized by little external sympathy.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by the Old Right in the first half of the 20th century.
It was influenced by Ludwig von Mises.
It was influenced by Albert Jay Nock.
It was influenced by Garet Garrett.
It was influenced by the entire interwar Old Right that opposed the New Deal and favored the Old Republic.
IsA: It is a right-libertarian political activism strategy.
KnownAs: It is known as the "Paleo strategy".
KnownFor: It is known for uniting libertarians and paleoconservatives.
OccurredIn: It occurred in the American political context after the end of the Cold War.
PartOf: It is part of the "Paleo strategy".
UsedAs: It is used as a strategy to unite libertarians and paleoconservatives.
UsedFor: It is used for uniting libertarians and paleoconservatives.
It is used for communicating libertarian notions of opposition to government intervention.
It is used for combining libertarian free market views with the cultural conservatism of paleoconservatism.
It is used for opposing protectionism.
It is used for embracing the paleoconservative reverence for tradition and religion.
It is used for radicalizing citizens against the state.
It is used for shifting the libertarian movement away from the influence of public policy-oriented libertarian organizations.
It is used for shifting American right-wing politics away from the neoconservative movement.
It is used for making a better argument for liberty to the middle classes.
It is used for application of libertarian principles in ways that lead to the radicalization of the middle classes against the state.
UsedIn: It is used in the American political context.
It is used in the context of the end of the Cold War.
It is used in the 1992 presidential election.
It is used in the 2016 Republican Party presidential primaries.
It is used in the campaign for the 2016 United States presidential election.
UsedTo: It is used to communicate libertarian notions of opposition to government intervention.
It is used to radicalize citizens against the state.
It is used to shift the libertarian movement away from the influence of public policy-oriented libertarian organizations.
It is used to shift American right-wing politics away from the neoconservative movement.
It is used to gain the disaffected working and middle classes using right-wing populism methods to deliver libertarian ideas.
It is used to rebirth an anti-war and anti-welfare right-wing.
It is used to fight the neoconservative leadership of the Republican Party.
It is used to make a better argument for liberty to the middle classes.
